app.dropHint: The file will be converted immediately.

toast.updateAvailable: A new update is available ({count} commit(s) behind).

empty.layers: No layers — select a placement to populate the inspector.
empty.magazine: No active profile — open the Plotter drawer to pick one.

files.title: Files
files.emptyHint: Drop a file anywhere on the window or click "Add a file" to start.
files.dragHint: Drag onto the plan to place an instance
files.duplicate: Place another instance on the plan
files.deleteConfirm: Delete "{name}" from the library? Placements on the plan will also be removed.
files.dropToImport: Drop to add to the library
files.uploadInProgress: An upload is already in progress.

integrity.title: {count} file(s) need to be re-uploaded to restore style editing.

editModal.title: File settings
editModal.tabShortcut: Press {key} to jump to this tab
editModal.resizeHandle: Drag to resize · double-click to reset
editModal.unsavedWarning: You have unsaved changes. Close anyway?
editModal.overwriteMessage: This file already has a conversion. Overwrite the existing result?

source.perLayerHint: Pick the rendering style and pen slot for each colour in the Layers tab.

colors.monoHint: Single-ink mode — pick the master style on the Render tab.
colors.noSource: Attach a file on the Source tab to choose colour settings.
colors.notApplicable: This file type doesn't use colour segmentation.

svg.centerlineDesc: Trace the medial skeleton instead of region outlines. Best for schematics and line art. Thick filled areas collapse to a single line at the centre, which is intentional.
svg.minBranchDesc: Skeleton branches shorter than this many segmentation-canvas pixels are dropped. Lower to 1-2 px to keep tick marks, dimension serifs and hatching on a technical drawing; raise to 4-5 px for noisier scans.
svg.simplifyDesc: Higher values remove more intermediate vertices when /optimize runs. Applies to every layer in the current placement.
svg.curveFitDesc: Convert simplified polylines into cubic Bézier paths for smoother plotter motion.
svg.notApplicable: This file type doesn't use SVG conversion controls.

style.notApplicable: This file type doesn't use the style controls.

text.notApplicable: This file type doesn't carry text.

preprocess.intro: Prepare the source image before it's segmented into colour layers.
preprocess.previewNote: Brightness, contrast, saturation, blur, invert, grayscale, crop and orientation render live. Gamma, levels and sharpen will show up on the other tabs once the SVG re-renders.
preprocess.noSource: Attach a file to start adjusting the image.
preprocess.notApplicable: This file type isn't a bitmap — nothing to preprocess.

basic.title: Brightness & colour
basic.gammaHint: Below 1 darkens midtones, above 1 lightens them.

levels.title: Levels
levels.hint: Recentre the tonal range — useful before threshold-based segmentation.

filters.title: Filters
filters.ditherHint: Diffuses rounding error across neighbouring pixels to mimic newsprint — makes halftone / stippling read crisper by snapping gradients to discrete tones.

render.multicolorHint: Multicolour rendering is per-layer. Switch to the Layers tab to pick a style for each colour.
render.noSource: Attach a file on the Source tab to choose a render style.
render.notApplicable: This file type doesn't have a render style.
render.replaceOverridesWarning: Switching style will replace {count} per-layer override(s). Continue?
render.customisedHint: Current settings no longer match the preset.
render.customisedExplain: Settings drifted from the "{style}" preset — click a preset to reset to its defaults.

mono.shadesHint: 1 = a single layer, a single pen (no shading). Increase to split the image into grey bands — each band adds a layer and carries its own algorithm tuned by the chosen mode.
mono.thresholdHint: Pixels darker than this become the rendered region; lighter pixels are dropped.
mono.detailHint: Higher detail rebuilds the SVG from the image at a larger source canvas — finer features survive (small text, table grids, dense schematics), conversion takes longer.
mono.layersHint: Each band becomes one layer — open the Layers tab to fine-tune any band, swap its algorithm, or stack multi-pass effects.

modes.pencilDesc: Layered cross-hatching at varying angles for a hand-drawn feel.
modes.halftoneDesc: Dot grid; cell size grows with brightness for a tonal print.
modes.stipplingDesc: Scattered dots whose density tracks luminance — portrait-friendly.
modes.engravingDesc: Wavy scanlines with band-dependent spacing — banknote look.
modes.contoursDesc: Nested contour rings, denser for darker bands.
modes.outlineDesc: Pure edge tracing — logos, signs, simple line art.
modes.otsuBinaryDesc: Auto-picks the ink/paper split from the image histogram. No threshold to tune — robust on scans and high-contrast photos.
modes.tspDesc: One continuous nearest-neighbour tour through dark pixels.
modes.spiralDesc: Single amplitude-modulated spiral: wide wobble in shadows, thin line in highlights.
modes.centerlineDesc: Skeletonise then trace each stroke as a single polyline — ideal for schematics and line art.
modes.flowFieldDesc: Streamlines that curve along the image gradient — a flowing, wind-map feel.
modes.voronoiShadeDesc: Relaxed dots with even, organic spacing — a cleaner stipple than scattered dots.
modes.hatchFillDesc: Rotating hatch angles stitched into one path per band — fewer pen lifts.
modes.squiggleShadeDesc: Wavy hand-drawn rows; wider wiggle in shadows, thin line in highlights.
modes.hilbertFillDesc: A single Hilbert space-filling curve packs each band — one continuous stroke.
modes.gosperFillDesc: Hexagonal flowsnake space-filling curve — a softer cousin of Hilbert.
modes.concentricRingsDesc: Nested offset rings stitched into one spiral — denser for darker bands.
modes.tspOptimizedDesc: Like TSP but with a 2-opt pass — a shorter, cleaner continuous tour.
modes.silhouetteDesc: Solid vector shapes traced from the binarised image — logos and bold cut-outs.
modes.lowpolyDesc: Faceted Delaunay triangulation; denser facets in shadows for a geometric look.
modes.scribbleDesc: Loose, wobbly hand-drawn hatching with overshooting strokes — a sketched feel.
modes.ridgePulsarDesc: Horizontal lines pushed up by darkness — the pulsar-plot portrait.
modes.ditherPrintDesc: Error-diffusion dots — newspaper / retro-computer tonal screen.
modes.etchBurinDesc: Short strokes following the image's isophotes — banknote engraving.
modes.stringThreadDesc: One continuous thread between rim pegs, stacked where darkest.
modes.hilbertAdaptiveDesc: One Hilbert stroke that tightens where the image is dark.
modes.quadtreeMosaicDesc: Squares splitting recursively where darker — tone as structure.
modes.phyllotaxisBloomDesc: Sunflower-spiral dots sized by darkness — botanical halftone.
modes.voronoiShatterDesc: Cracked-glaze cell walls, smaller cells where darker.
modes.textShadingDesc: Rows of single-stroke text emerging from the shadows.
modes.attractorSmokeDesc: Chaotic-orbit dots gated by darkness — smoky filaments.
modes.superpixelPaintDesc: Superpixel patches each hatched along their own orientation.
modes.noiseTopoDesc: Iso-lines of tone warped by noise, pooling around dark features.
modes.coralGrowthDesc: Reaction-diffusion Turing pattern grown inside the region.
modes.schotterTumbleDesc: Grid squares tumbling into disorder where the image is darkest — Georg Nees' Schotter.
modes.veinGrowthDesc: Veins grow toward the dark areas — root / lightning texture.
modes.honeycombToneDesc: Hexagonal lattice with cells shrinking where the image is darker.
modes.truchetTilesDesc: Randomly oriented Truchet diagonals; smaller tiles shade the darker bands.
modes.mazeWalkDesc: A perfect maze carved over the subject; tighter corridors read darker.
modes.basketWeaveDesc: Interlacing over/under ribbons; narrower bands shade the darker areas.
modes.stitchRowsDesc: Sashiko stitch rows weaving an interlocking pattern; finer pitch where darker.
modes.bubblePackDesc: Non-overlapping packed circles; smaller bubbles crowd the dark bands.
modes.brickCoursesDesc: Running-bond brick courses; shorter courses shade the darker bands.
modes.dashShadingDesc: Hatch rows chopped into short dashes, rotating angle and tightening per band.
modes.vinylRingsDesc: Concentric circles about the region centre; groove pitch tightens where darker.
modes.sunburstRaysDesc: Radial rays fanning out from the centre; more rays in the dark bands.
modes.threadFansDesc: Nail-and-thread chord fans per cell; smaller cells with more chords read darker.
modes.moireBeatDesc: Two offset ring gratings beating into op-art fringes; tighter where darker.
modes.penroseFacetsDesc: Aperiodic five-fold rhombi; an extra subdivision densifies the dark bands.
modes.dragonCurveDesc: L-system dragon curve folded through the subject — one fractal stroke.
modes.chladniPlateDesc: Nodal lines of a vibrating plate — resonance sand patterns over the subject.
modes.pendulumTraceDesc: Damped twin-pendulum figure drawn as one long decaying stroke.
modes.fernGrowthDesc: Branching plant L-system grown over the subject — botanical fractal.
modes.kochIslandDesc: Koch-island fractal coastline folded through the subject.
modes.sierpinskiSweepDesc: Sierpiński arrowhead curve — one triangular fractal stroke.
modes.ringHalftoneDesc: Halftone screen of hollow rings — same tonal mapping, airier than dots.
modes.crossStitchDesc: Halftone screen of plus-sign crosses — embroidery / sampler feel.
modes.truchetPipesDesc: Quarter-circle Smith tiles weaving continuous pipes; smaller tiles where darker.
modes.moireLinesDesc: Two straight gratings beating into op-art fringes; tighter where darker.
modes.ridgeRadialDesc: Concentric rings pushed outward by darkness — the radial pulsar portrait.
modes.bayerPrintDesc: Bayer-matrix dots on a fixed grid — the 8-bit / retro-print texture.
modes.windFieldDesc: Streamlines riding smooth noise, denser where the image is dark.
modes.smokeCliffordDesc: Clifford-attractor orbit scattered as smoky filaments.
modes.turingStripesDesc: Reaction-diffusion stripe pattern grown inside the region.
modes.soundWaveDesc: Waves whose frequency and amplitude follow the tone — shadows buzz, highlights flatten.
modes.asciiArtDesc: Typewriter-art portrait — each cell draws a glyph from a density ramp picked by its tone.
modes.lightningDesc: Jagged discharge branches seeking the dark, forking in the shadows.
modes.opArtWarpDesc: Op-art grid pushed along the tone gradient — the mesh bulges around dark masses.
modes.fishScalesDesc: Staggered roof-tile arcs; shadows nest extra ribs inside each scale.

mono.inkColorHint: Single colour every band is traced with — grey levels come from the algorithm's density variation.
mono.anglesHint: Toggle up to 4 angles; each band picks a combination to darken shadows.
mono.densityRangeHint: Max density (dark bands) → min density (light bands).
mono.perBandHint: Click ↺ to restore the interpolated value.
mono.advancedModeHint: Reveals the per-band editor so you can pin specific values.
mono.dotDensityHint: Higher density → darker image. The path is a single nearest-neighbour tour.
mono.spiralTonalHint: One continuous spiral: the line thickens (wobbles) in dark areas and stays thin in highlights. Tone comes from the image, not the band count.
mono.spiralSpacingHint: Distance between two turns. Tighter → finer tone, denser image.
mono.spiralWavelengthHint: Length of the wobbles along the line. Shorter → finer texture.
mono.spiralStrengthHint: Maximum wobble amplitude in shadows (capped at half the turn spacing).

editPreview.title: Preview
editPreview.emptyHint: The preview reflects every setting on the right.
editPreview.resetView: Reset view (click) · scroll to zoom · drag to pan
editPreview.livePreviewHint: Reflects every setting change — not yet committed to the plan.
editPreview.savedHint: Last committed conversion — change settings then click Re-convert to refresh.
editPreview.sourceHint: Showing the original image with your Image-tab adjustments overlaid. Switch tabs to see the SVG render.
editPreview.splitHint: Drag the handle left/right to reveal more or less of the original image (left) or the computed result (right).
editPreview.modeAutoHint: Default: computed SVG when available, otherwise the original image.
editPreview.modeSourceHint: Show the original image with CSS-overlaid preprocess adjustments.
editPreview.modeSplitHint: Drag the handle to compare the original image with the computed result.
editPreview.qualityDraftHint: Fastest. Caps sample resolution at 256px and uses a single k-means restart. Best for slider drags.
editPreview.qualityStandardHint: Honours your detail / max-dimension choice with a single k-means restart. Default.
editPreview.qualityFinalHint: Near-/upload fidelity: full 10-restart k-means at your full detail. Slowest.
editPreview.estimateHint: Estimated /preview latency — algorithm complexity: {complexity}. Refines over time from observed runs.

blockMap.title: Document blocks
blockMap.empty: No blocks detected on this page.
blockMap.hint: Text and image regions detected on the current page.

printMode.title: Colour mode
printMode.multicolorHint: Split the image into one layer per detected colour.
printMode.monochromeHint: Draw everything on a single layer with one pen.

palette.title: Palette
palette.followHint: Colours are locked to the pens installed in the machine profile.
palette.autoHint: Automatic (k-means) extraction of the chosen number of colours — each colour becomes a layer.
palette.noPensInstalled: No pens are marked as installed in the active profile.
palette.manualSwap: {count} of {total} colours have no pen slot — {count} manual swap(s) will be requested during the plot (only {slots} slots available).
palette.droppedAsBackground: These light colours sit above the background threshold and will be skipped as paper:

colorStyles.flatDesc: One coloured layer per cluster — direct trace, no textured fill.
colorStyles.flatLabDesc: Flat aplats, but clusters chosen in perceptual Lab space — sharper colour separation when pens are few.
colorStyles.paletteDitherDesc: Snap to your pen palette with Bayer dithering — fakes mid-tones with few pens. Set the palette in the Colours block.
colorStyles.crosshatchDesc: Hatching at rotating angles per colour, tighter spacing on darker clusters.
colorStyles.stippleDesc: Voronoi-relaxed stippling per colour, density varying with luminance.
colorStyles.halftoneCmykDesc: Dot-grid halftone with canonical CMYK screen angles per dominant primary.
colorStyles.contoursTopoDesc: Concentric rings per cluster, density tracking luminance.
colorStyles.flowfieldDesc: Colour streamlines along the gradient — variable density, organic look.
colorStyles.sketchDesc: Hand-drawn wavy hatching per colour, amplitude modulated by luminance.
colorStyles.spiralDesc: Concentric offset rings per colour with spacing adapted to density.
colorStyles.numColorsHint: How many K-means clusters to extract — each cluster becomes one layer.
colorStyles.numColorsCapped: {requested} colours requested but only {available} distinct pen colours are available — install more pens or switch the palette to Auto / Manual.
colorStyles.numColorsLocked: Locked to the manual palette. Edit the colour list below.
colorStyles.flatNoKnobs: No knobs for flat colours — each cluster is traced as-is.
colorStyles.angleStepHint: Angle offset added per cluster — avoids moiré when inks overlap.
colorStyles.iterationsHint: More Lloyd iterations = smoother spread but slower preview.
colorStyles.cmykHint: Screen angles auto-picked per dominant primary (C 15° · M 75° · Y 0°).
colorStyles.seedSpacingHint: Distance between streamline seed points — wider = fewer paths.
colorStyles.stipplingClassicDesc: Random dots per colour — density varies with luminance (simple variant, no relaxation).
colorStyles.edgesDesc: Edge detection per colour — great for logos, vector illustrations, sharp lines.
colorStyles.centerlineDesc: Medial skeleton traced per colour — coloured line art, multi-ink schematics.
colorStyles.spiralClassicDesc: Clipped Archimedean spirals per colour — spacing varies with luminance.
colorStyles.scanlinesDesc: Horizontal sweep per colour — optional sinusoidal modulation.
colorStyles.tspDesc: Nearest-neighbour tour per cluster — one continuous stroke per colour.
colorStyles.tspHint: Higher density = denser layer, longer to compute on dense images.
colorStyles.hilbertDesc: Fill with the fractal Hilbert curve — minimal pen lifts.
colorStyles.gosperDesc: Fill with the Gosper / flowsnake curve — organic fractal look.
colorStyles.gosperOrderHint: Fractal order — higher = finer curve but heavier SVG.
colorStyles.eulerianDesc: Hatching reordered as an Eulerian path per colour — few pen lifts.
colorStyles.tspOptDesc: 2-opt tour on Poisson-disk points per colour — higher quality than basic TSP.
colorStyles.gridDesc: Square graph-paper mesh per colour — spacing tightens on darker clusters.
colorStyles.brickDesc: Running-bond brick pattern per colour — smaller bricks on darker clusters.
colorStyles.dashesDesc: Dashed hatching per colour — angle rotates per cluster to avoid moiré.
colorStyles.truchetDesc: Maze-like Truchet tiles per colour — finer tiles on darker clusters.
colorStyles.ringsDesc: Concentric circles about each region's centroid — the tree-ring look.
colorStyles.sunburstDesc: Radial rays fanning from each region's centroid — denser on dark clusters.
colorStyles.circlePackDesc: Packed circle outlines per colour — smaller bubbles on darker clusters.
colorStyles.raysRangeHint: Denser ray fan on darker clusters, sparser on light ones.
colorStyles.radiusRangeHint: Smaller bubbles on darker clusters for denser coverage.
colorStyles.ridgeLinesDesc: Displaced ridge lines per colour, tighter on dominant clusters.
colorStyles.hitomezashiDesc: Sashiko stitch lattice per colour, finer on dominant clusters.
colorStyles.cubicDisarrayDesc: Tumbling squares per colour — the Schotter generative classic.
colorStyles.quadtreeDesc: Recursive squares per colour, splitting deepest on dominant clusters.
colorStyles.mazeDesc: A perfect maze carved into each colour region.
colorStyles.voronoiMosaicDesc: Cracked-glaze cell walls per colour, finer on dominant clusters.
colorStyles.curveStitchingDesc: Nail-and-thread chord envelopes per colour cell.
colorStyles.stringArtDesc: A continuous thread per colour region, denser on dominant clusters.
colorStyles.spaceColonizationDesc: Branching veins growing through each colour region.
colorStyles.penroseDesc: Aperiodic five-fold rhombi tiling each colour region.
colorStyles.ditherDesc: Error-diffusion dot screen per colour — print-press texture.
colorStyles.etchDesc: Short isophote-following strokes per colour region.
colorStyles.reactionDiffusionDesc: Alternating spot / stripe growth per colour region.
colorStyles.superpixelHatchDesc: Per-patch oriented hatching inside each colour region.
colorStyles.moireDesc: Interference ring gratings per colour region.
colorStyles.weaveDesc: Interlaced over/under ribbons per colour region.
colorStyles.honeycombDesc: Hexagonal lattice per colour, finer on dominant clusters.
colorStyles.harmonographDesc: A damped pendulum figure traced inside each colour region.
colorStyles.attractorDesc: Chaotic-orbit dot filaments per colour region.
colorStyles.textFillDesc: Rows of single-stroke text filling each colour region.
colorStyles.lsystemDesc: A different fractal grammar per colour region.
colorStyles.chladniDesc: Vibrating-plate nodal lines, a different mode per colour.

printStyles.directDesc: One stroke per region, no fill
printStyles.centerlineDesc: Trace strokes as single polylines (line art)
printStyles.voronoiStippleDesc: Evenly-spaced dots via Lloyd relaxation, can weight by luminance.
printStyles.squiggleDesc: Wiggly lines with drifting amplitude / frequency — hand-drawn look.
printStyles.flowfieldDesc: Streamlines following gradient or Perlin noise — few pen lifts.
printStyles.hilbertDesc: Hilbert curve fill — continuous fractal walk.
printStyles.gosperDesc: Gosper curve / flowsnake — organic fractal fill.
printStyles.eulerianHatchDesc: Hatching reordered as an Eulerian path — fewer pen lifts.
printStyles.concentricOffsetDesc: Successive offset rings from the boundary, connected in a spiral.
printStyles.tspOptDesc: 2-opt optimised tour on the points (Poisson-disk + time budget).
printStyles.gridDesc: Square mesh of horizontal + vertical strokes.
printStyles.brickDesc: Running-bond brick pattern with staggered joints.
printStyles.dashesDesc: Parallel strokes chopped into dashes — stitched texture.
printStyles.truchetDesc: Random diagonals on a grid — maze-like graphic fill.
printStyles.ringsDesc: Concentric circles about the region centroid.
printStyles.sunburstDesc: Radial rays fanning out from the region centroid.
printStyles.circlePackDesc: Packed non-overlapping circle outlines — bubble fill.
printStyles.ridgeLinesDesc: Lines displaced upward by darkness (pulsar plot).
printStyles.hitomezashiDesc: Sashiko stitch lattice of phase-shifted dashes.
printStyles.cubicDisarrayDesc: Squares tumbling into disorder where darker.
printStyles.mazeDesc: A perfect maze moulded to the region.
printStyles.voronoiMosaicDesc: Cracked-glaze cell walls, smaller cells where darker.
printStyles.curveStitchingDesc: Per-cell chord fans reading as parabola envelopes.
printStyles.stringArtDesc: One continuous thread between rim pegs.
printStyles.spaceColonizationDesc: Branching veins growing toward dark areas.
printStyles.noiseContoursDesc: Iso-lines of tone warped by fractal noise.
printStyles.superpixelHatchDesc: Superpixels hatched along their own orientation.
printStyles.moireDesc: Two offset ring gratings beating into fringes.
printStyles.honeycombDesc: Hexagonal lattice clipped to the region.
printStyles.textFillDesc: Repeated single-stroke text as shading texture.
printStyles.chladniDesc: Nodal lines of a vibrating plate.
printStyles.lowpolyDesc: Delaunay triangle wireframe, facets sized by density.

execute.runHint: Generate G-code to send it or add it to the queue.

footer.estimatePendingHint: Generate the G-code to get a realistic time estimate (includes pen-up travel and tool changes).

slo.title: SLO dashboard
slo.intro: Evaluates {count} in-memory perf sample(s) against the backend's budget table.
slo.noSamples: No perf samples collected yet — use the app a bit, then re-evaluate.

manifests.title: Backend manifests
manifests.intro: Versioned contracts the backend currently exposes. The UI parses them with zod and falls back to a bundled snapshot if the backend is unreachable.

upload.dropHere: Drop a file here or click to browse.
upload.failed: Upload failed. Check the file type and that the API is running.
upload.nameTooLong: Filename is too long (255 chars max).
upload.previewTimeout: Preview too slow for this style. Lower the Detail tier or hit Apply to render anyway.
upload.sourceReloadFailed: Couldn't reload the original file — the live preview is unavailable.
upload.previewHint: Pick an algorithm to see the preview.
upload.applyAnywayHint: Preview failed, but you can still apply to run the full render.

layers.title: Layers
layers.convertSyncHint: The global style and colour settings from the Style tab are applied to every layer when you click “Import & convert”. The per-layer tweaks below override the global style and are kept across re-converts.
layers.emptyHint: One layer per colour will appear here after you click "Upload & convert" above — pick a plotting style and a pen slot for each.
layers.mergeToOnePenHint: Reassign every layer to pen slot 0 — useful when only one ink is loaded.
layers.autoPickMagazineHint: Snap every layer's colour to the nearest match among the pens mounted in the magazine (ΔE 2000).
layers.autoPickAvailableHint: Snap every layer's colour to the nearest match in the available-colours inventory (ΔE 2000).
layers.fillHint: Optimization converts filled shapes to outline strokes (pens draw lines, not fills).
layers.rerenderUnavailable: Re-rendering is unavailable; re-upload the file to apply the new style.
layers.rerenderCacheMiss: Server-side cache expired — click Apply to run the full render.
layers.generateMovedHint: Generate G-code lives in the Plan header — close this dialog and click the green button on the top-right of the preview.
layers.penWarning: Source colour {color} has no perfect pen — closest is slot #{slot} ({penColor}).
layers.penWarningNone: No pen installed in the magazine.
layers.collapseAllHint: Reduce every layer card to its header
layers.expectedHint: Layers this image will produce when you Apply

passes.title: Passes
passes.enableHint: Stack several algorithms on the same colour (e.g. outline + fill).
passes.emptyHint: Add a pass to draw this colour with several stacked algorithms.
passes.badgeHint: Multi-pass — this colour is drawn with several stacked algorithms.
passes.reuploadHint: Re-uploading will reset the {count} multi-pass layer(s) you've configured.
passes.reuploadWarning: Re-uploading will reset {count} multi-pass layer(s). Continue?

confirm.deleteProfileMsg: Delete profile "{name}"? This cannot be undone.
confirm.sendJobMsg: Send the generated G-code to the plotter and start drawing?
confirm.homeMsg: Move the plotter to its home position?

presets.title: Presets
presets.hint: Reuse the settings of a previous placement.
presets.nothingToSave: Pick a placement and set at least one per-layer algorithm to save it as a preset.

preflight.missingPens: Pen slot(s) {slots} are assigned but not installed; install them or reassign before generating.

missingSlots.title: Pen slots not installed
missingSlots.message: Layer(s) target pen slot(s) {slots}, which are not installed in the magazine. The plotter will pause on M0 and wait for you to swap the pen manually each time. Continue?

sheet.title: Sheet layout
sheet.outOfBounds: The drawing exceeds the workspace; it may be clipped or out of bounds.
sheet.viewHint: Wheel to zoom · drag to pan
sheet.sizeHint: Saved on the machine profile. Existing drawings will be refit.
sheet.workAreaHint: (machine max — edit in Plotter › Machine profile)
sheet.centreHint: Centre the selected file on the zone chosen above
sheet.exceedsWarning: Sheet exceeds the machine work area.
sheet.aspectLockOn: Aspect ratio locked — click to allow free resize
sheet.aspectLockOff: Free resize — click to lock aspect ratio
sheet.clearAllMsg: Remove all files from the work plane? This cannot be undone.

typography.fontHint: Single-stroke fonts designed for pen plotters
typography.hersheyToggle: Re-render text with Hershey single-stroke font
typography.hersheyToggleHint: Replaces the document's TrueType glyph outlines with single-stroke polylines at the same positions and sizes — the only legible way to plot document text with a pen.

convert.embeddedImageHint: These options only apply to raster images embedded in the document. Text and vector content are not affected.
convert.specificColorsHint: Optional. Pin exact colors to use; the image will snap to them.
convert.fixedPaletteRefHint: Edit the pinned colours in the Colours block above.
convert.algoTspHint: Greedy tour through stippled dots. Prefer optimized TSP.
convert.seg_kmeans_lab_hint: Perceptual clustering — groups colours the way the eye does.
convert.seg_palette_dither_hint: Ordered dithering toward the palette — fakes mid-tones from few pens.
convert.paletteDitherNote: Uses the same palette as Fixed palette, with ordered dithering on top.
convert.thresholdsHint: N thresholds → N+1 bands sorted by brightness.
convert.algoTspOptHint: Faster, shorter tour (NN + 2-opt). Prefer over legacy TSP.
convert.algoEulerianHint: Connected zig-zag hatching — far fewer pen-lifts than crosshatch.

profile.title: Machine profile
profile.name: Name
profile.nameHint: Shown in the active-profile picker and the file header.
profile.unitsNoConvertHint: Changing units relabels the fields only — existing numbers are not converted.
profile.originHint: Position of the machine's (0, 0) reference relative to the work area.
profile.workspaceHint: Maximum reachable area for the head. Drawings are clipped to this rectangle.
profile.workspaceInvalid: Max must be greater than min on both axes — check X and Y bounds.
profile.drawingSpeedHint: Head speed while the pen is down. Lower for thicker / wetter inks.
profile.travelSpeedHint: Head speed while the pen is up. Usually faster than drawing.
profile.accelerationHint: Higher = sharper corners but more vibration. Try 500–2000.
profile.accelerationNotOnWire: This dialect doesn't receive an acceleration command (M204) — the value still informs the time estimate but isn't sent to the machine.
profile.penLiftTimeHint: How long the servo (or solenoid) takes to settle on each lift or drop. Counted twice per stroke — drives the time estimate when the drawing has many short paths. Typical hobby servos: 100–250 ms; instant Z-axis: 0.
profile.penUpHint: G-code or shorthand sent to lift the pen (e.g. M5, SE,0).
profile.penDownHint: G-code sent to lower the pen (e.g. M3 S1000, SE,1).
profile.toolChangeMethodHint: How the machine swaps pens between layers.
profile.penSlotsHint: How many distinct pens the magazine can hold.
profile.magazineMovedHint: Colour set in the Colours tab
profile.colorManagementHint: How this plotter handles colour. Assigning colours to pens happens in the Colours tab.

colorModeHint.mono: One pen only, no tool change.
colorModeHint.manual: Multiple colours: the plotter pauses so you swap the pen by hand.
colorModeHint.magazine: Motorised carousel / rack: the plotter swaps pens on its own.
colorModeHint.firmware: The controller swaps the pen itself on a single G-code command.
colorModeHint.host: No native swap: the Raspberry Pi sends a G-code sequence to drive the magazine.

profile.firmwareCommandHint: Single command the controller runs to change pen. {slot} / {color} / {label} are substituted.

hostSwap.intro: The pen change, step by step — no G-code. Fine-tune the sequence below if needed.

step.move_to_old_slot: Go to the current pen's slot
step.move_to_new_slot: Go to the new pen's slot

mechanismHint.rack: A gripper on the carriage takes pens out of / puts them back into a rack (vertical engage).
mechanismHint.dock: Each pen is a whole tool parked in a dock; the head slides in/out to (un)couple it (horizontal engage).

rack.command: A motorised gripper clamps and releases the pen (servo command).
rack.motion: The pen is held by friction or a magnet: no command, the grab is the motion.

dock.command: A motorised latch couples/decouples the tool (servo command).
dock.motion: Magnetic / kinematic coupling: no command, the slide into the dock is the lock.

preview.title: Sequence preview
preview.empty: Add steps to see the preview.

hostSwap.dockIntro: The head travels to a dock, slides in to (un)couple, and leaves. Fine-tune the sequence below if needed.
hostSwap.empty: Add at least one step — a host magazine needs a sequence to run.
hostSwap.positionsHint: X/Y of each slot, in profile units. This is the engagement point where the pen is grabbed. “Go to slot” travels to the approach point (offset by the clearance below). Leave blank for an uncalibrated slot.

cal.warn: Installed pen with no position: the swap will skip it.

hostSwap.uncalibrated: {n} installed pen(s) with no position — the swap will skip them.
hostSwap.clearanceHint: How far to back out of a slot before moving sideways, so the head clears the neighbouring pens. “Advance/Back out of the slot” hop this gap. Set 0 if no insertion move is needed.
hostSwap.servoHeightsHint: The rack often sits higher than the paper, so raising/lowering into it uses a different servo angle. Leave blank to reuse the profile's pen-up/-down.
hostSwap.zOverridesServo: A Z axis is configured below, so these servo commands are ignored.
hostSwap.heightsHint: Only for machines with a motorised Z axis. Filled in, “Raise/Lower head” emit G0 Z moves and take precedence over the servo commands above.
hostSwap.engageAboveSafe: Engage depth should be below the travel height (engage Z < safe Z).
hostSwap.outOfRange: A height is outside the machine Z limits.
hostSwap.dockPositionsHint: X/Y of each dock, in profile units. This is where the tool is coupled. “Go to slot” travels to the approach point (offset by the entry depth below). Leave blank for an uncalibrated dock.
hostSwap.dockClearanceHint: How far to slide into the dock to (un)couple the tool. The head goes to the approach point first, then “Advance/Back out” hop this gap to enter/leave the dock.

profile.penCountMagazineHint: How many slots are available in the magazine.
profile.penCountManualHint: How many pens you alternate between by hand.
profile.penChangePositionHint: Where the head parks (machine coordinates) before a manual swap so you can reach the pen. Leave blank to park at the workspace home corner.
profile.monoNote: Single-colour mode: only one pen is used.
profile.dialectHint: Controller flavour. EBB uses its own short commands and CR terminator.
profile.arcToleranceHint: Max chord error when arcs are flattened. Smaller = smoother but more lines.
profile.ebbHint: Only used when the dialect is set to EBB.
profile.stepsPerMmHint: Motor steps per mm of head travel. Calibrate against a measured line.
profile.servoRateHint: Servo movement speed (units/sec). Higher = snappier pen up/down.
profile.servoDownHint: Servo position for pen on paper (typical: 8000–12000).
profile.serialTerminatorHint: Line ending appended to commands sent over the serial port.
profile.unsavedDraft: Unsaved draft — click Save to persist it.

preview.placeholder: Upload a file to preview it here

simulator.title: Simulator
simulator.manualPenChangeHint: Pause before each layer so you can swap the pen by hand.
simulator.colorClickHint: Click to toggle · double-click to isolate this colour.

plotter.title: Plotter
plotter.commandFailed: Plotter command failed (is a device connected?).
plotter.deviceLost: Plotter disconnected during a run. The head position is unreliable — check the machine and reconnect before resuming.
plotter.stopMsg: The plotter will abort the current job. This cannot be undone.
plotter.manualHint: Drive the plotter by hand — jog the head, send it home, raise or lower the pen.
plotter.manualDisconnected: Connect to a plotter first to enable manual controls.
plotter.penCommandsMissing: Set pen up / pen down commands in the active profile to enable these buttons.
plotter.connectionHint: Open the serial link to your plotter, then jog or send jobs.
plotter.portHint: e.g. /dev/ttyUSB0 on Linux, COM3 on Windows.
plotter.macrosHint: Reusable command sequences — homing, pen-park, calibration. Run them from this panel when the plotter is idle.
plotter.queueHint: Send the current job to the plotter or stack it for later. Active runs show progress and can be paused or canceled here.
plotter.newPlotterPrompt: Name for the new plotter profile?
plotter.newPlotterNoBase: Pick an existing profile first — the wizard clones it as the base.
plotter.newPlotterFailed: Could not save the new profile
plotter.controlHint: Connect the plotter, drive it manually and start prints from this tab.

assignedColor.title: Layer colour
assignedColor.resetTitle: Reset to the perceptually nearest colour in the active pool
assignedColor.pickHint: Pick a colour from the active pool to override the auto choice.
assignedColor.emptyPool: No colours in the active pool — add inks in Plotter ▸ Colours or install pens.

paletteSource.title: Palette source
paletteSource.pensHint: Layers pick from the pens currently in the magazine.
paletteSource.availableHint: Layers pick from your global ink inventory below.
paletteSource.unionHint: Layers pick from installed pens AND available inks, deduplicated.
paletteSource.loadFailed: Could not load the palette source setting.
paletteSource.updateFailed: Could not update the palette source setting.

availableColors.hint: Your global ink inventory, and the colour assignment for each magazine slot. Declare every Sharpie / fineliner you own once.
availableColors.odometerTitle: Total distance actually drawn with this pen. Accumulates on each print — reset when you swap the pen.
availableColors.empty: No colours yet. Add your first ink above.
availableColors.duplicate: That colour is already in the inventory ({name}).
availableColors.loadFailed: Could not load the colour inventory.

magazine.title: Magazine
magazine.monoHint: A single pen: pick its colour.
magazine.hintManual: The colour of each pen you alternate by hand. The app prompts you to insert the right pen at each change. No physical magazine — no position to set.
magazine.hint: Assign a colour to each magazine slot. Options come from the available colours above; click the swatch to set a free hex.

macros.title: Macros
macros.runHint: Connect a plotter (and pause any running job) to run macros.
macros.name: Name

swap.title: Pen change required
swap.parkedHint: The head has parked at the pen-change position. Swap the pen, then resume.

queue.title: Print queue
queue.cancelMsg: Cancel "{name}"? A running job will stop immediately.
queue.loadFailed: Could not load the print queue.
queue.enqueueFailed: Could not add the job to the queue.
queue.skipNotice: Run "{name}" skipped layer(s): {layers}. Recovery policy: skip_layer.

system.title: System
system.subtitle: Version info and GitHub self-update.
system.updateHint: Pulls the latest commit, reinstalls dependencies and rebuilds the UI.
system.updateConfirmMsg: Pull the latest code from GitHub and rebuild? Cancel any running job first.
system.needsRestart: Restart the service to load the new Python code.
system.dirtyWarning: Uncommitted local changes detected on this host.
system.forceUpdateHint: Overwrites local changes then updates. Cannot be undone.
system.forceUpdateConfirmMsg: Local changes will be permanently discarded. Continue?
system.forcedNotice: Forced update — local changes were discarded.
system.notifyOnStartup: Notify on startup when an update is available
system.notifyOnStartupHint: Shows a toast on page load when a new commit is available on the remote.
system.planPreviewHint: What the Plan tab paints for each placement.
system.planPreviewAutoHint: Shows the chosen-style preview, but falls back to the original image for heavy drawings so panning and zooming stay smooth.
system.planPreviewSvgHint: Always shows the chosen style — a true preview of what will be plotted. May feel slow on very dense drawings.
system.planPreviewImageHint: Always shows the original source image. Lightest to render, but doesn't reflect the chosen style.

updateModal.statusPulling: Pulling the latest code and rebuilding the UI…
updateModal.noopMessage: No new commits — your install is already current.
updateModal.errorMessage: Something went wrong during the update.
updateModal.doNotClose: Don't close this window — the interface is locked until the operation finishes.
updateModal.forcedNotice: Forced update — local changes were discarded.
updateModal.cacheHint: To load the rebuilt UI, do a hard refresh that bypasses the cache.
updateModal.cacheShortcut: Shortcut: Ctrl + Shift + R (⌘ + Shift + R on Mac)

mode.assistedHint: Guided wizard: pick intent, the resolver chooses an algorithm. Ctrl/Cmd+M to switch.
mode.expertHint: Rich editor: per-layer algorithm + passes + variants. Ctrl/Cmd+M to switch.

modal.title: Prepare the print
modal.resolverError: Resolver error: {message}. Falling back to static defaults.
modal.noPlacement: Open a file from the Files panel and click Edit on it. Without a placement, Generate has nothing to apply to.
modal.resetView: Reset view (double-click) · wheel to zoom · drag to pan
modal.paletteFree: Any ink (I'll swap pens by hand)
modal.inkFallback: No loaded ink matches — falling back to {hex}
modal.gestureHint: Wheel: zoom · Drag: pan · Double-click: recentre
modal.openExpertHint: Reveals the advanced controls: per-layer algorithm, multi-pass, variants.
modal.tourStep1Body: This is what the machine will actually draw. Wheel to zoom, drag to pan, double-click to recentre.
modal.tourStep2Body: Fast, balanced, or finest quality — one click updates the preview. You can change your mind anytime.
modal.tourStep3Body: The estimate and required inks are right under the preview. When you're ready, click Generate.
modal.styleHint: Optional — pick up to {max} styles to stack. Order = pass order.
modal.preamble: This is what your machine will draw. Pick how you want it rendered below, then click Generate.
modal.applyExpertHint: Re-convert the file with the settings from the Image / SVG / Style / Text tabs.

style.descSunburst: Rays fanning out from the centre

manifest.fallbackCache: Algorithm manifest served from local cache — backend offline.
manifest.fallbackSnapshot: Algorithm manifest served from the bundled snapshot — couldn't load the latest list.
manifest.fallbackVersion: The backend publishes a newer algorithms manifest than this UI — reload the page after updating the frontend.

capability.title: Configure the machine
capability.modeQuestion: How does the machine change pens?
capability.modeFirmwareHelp: The controller handles the change (CNC carousel, etc.).
capability.modeHostMacroHelp: The Raspberry sends a G-code sequence to drive the rack.
capability.modeManualHelp: The machine parks, the operator swaps the pen, then confirms.
capability.modeSinglePenHelp: One pen for the whole job.
capability.manualIntro: Customise the prompt shown to the operator:
capability.macroIntro: Command sequence sent on every pen change:
capability.noKnobs: No configuration needed for the “{mode}” mode.
capability.recoveryQuestion: What should happen when a pen change fails?
capability.recoveryAbort: Abort — the job is marked failed.
